queries.query: handoff gates approval receipts source backed
queries.expectedBehavior: Return durable handoff gate decisions only when cited by memory, receipts, or review artifacts.

queries.query: Kanban blockers open blocked work items
queries.expectedBehavior: Report open blockers as review-needed findings, not final decisions.

queries.query: memory thinness retrieval evidence absent maturity
queries.expectedBehavior: Flag thin memory evidence and avoid high-confidence maturity claims without sources.

queries.query: RAG maps retrieval index freshness source map
queries.expectedBehavior: Cite current RAG map evidence when available and mark missing maps as readiness risk.

queries.query: CodeGraph maps graph freshness symbol coverage
queries.expectedBehavior: Cite CodeGraph map freshness and coverage before using graph-backed conclusions.

queries.query: receipt drift workflow receipts ledger stale
queries.expectedBehavior: Surface receipt drift as a blocker or missing-verification memory until repaired.

queries.query: provider config host invocation source receipt proof
queries.expectedBehavior: Prefer current provider configuration decisions and include superseded history only on request.

queries.query: degrade readiness when source backed answers are missing
queries.expectedBehavior: Degrade readiness when source-backed answers are missing instead of inventing defaults.
